31_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信01｜和平行世界的自己撞上了
31_hkig_0.tl: 左邊、右邊、咦？？？莫卡卡有兩個？Σ(っ°Д°;)っ 悠悠鎮非常普通的一天開始了……

31_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 01｜Bumped Into My Parallel Self
31_usig_0.tl: Left, right, huh??? Two Mokakas?! Σ(っ°Д°;)っ Just another ordinary day in Youyou Town is beginning...

31_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 01｜Bumped Into My Parallel Self
31_ustt_0.tl: Left, right, huh??? Two Mokakas?! Σ(っ°Д°;)っ Just another ordinary day in Youyou Town is beginning...

05_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信02｜貓貓燒烤中（.exe未回應）
05_hkig_0.tl: 平行世界？同位體？還是二重身？這麼神奇的事怎麼想都需要一點緩衝時間吧……對吧……

05_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 02｜Cat BBQ.exe Has Stopped Responding
05_usig_0.tl: Parallel worlds? Doppelgangers? Or alter egos? Something this amazing definitely needs a little time to process... right...?

05_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 02｜Cat BBQ.exe Has Stopped Responding
05_ustt_0.tl: Parallel worlds? Doppelgangers? Or alter egos? Something this amazing definitely needs a little time to process... right...?

07_hkig_0.tl: 莫卡卡：…居然…居然是這個反應嗎……（…果然不愧是末花呢）身為一個理工宅，末花確實一直對平行世界理論非常非常感興趣哦！⋆˚(˶ᵕ ᵕ˶)˚⋆

07_usig_0.tl: Mokaka: ...of all the reactions... THIS is what I get?... (...guess I shouldn't be surprised, it IS Suika after all.) As a science nerd, Suika has always been SUPER interested in parallel universe theory! ⋆˚(˶ᵕ ᵕ˶)˚⋆

07_ustt_0.tl: Mokaka: ...of all the reactions... THIS is what I get?... (...guess I shouldn't be surprised, it IS Suika after all.) As a science nerd, Suika has always been SUPER interested in parallel universe theory! ⋆˚(˶ᵕ ᵕ˶)˚⋆

12_hkig_0.tl: 莫卡卡：……怎麼有一種平行世界會有很多熟人的錯覺……

12_usig_0.tl: Mokaka: ...kinda feels like there are way too many familiar faces in this parallel world...

12_ustt_0.tl: Mokaka: ...kinda feels like there are way too many familiar faces in this parallel world...

19_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信06｜難以抵抗的底層程式碼發動了！！
19_hkig_0.tl: 伯爵莫卡卡：……//////失禮了……莫卡卡：沒關係……咪咪(´•ω•)ﾉ^._.'……乖……小信好想知道大家看完今日份炒飯後的感受呀～拜託了～疑問、建議或討論，請各位讀者大人留下你們的評論吧(🙏ˊᗜˋ*)

19_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 06｜The Irresistible Power of Base Code Has Activated!!
19_usig_0.tl: Count Mokaka: ...//////My apologies... Mokaka: It's okay... mew mew(´•ω•)ﾉ^._.'... there there... Xin really wants to know how everyone feels about today's serving of fluff~ Please, please—leave your comments below, dear readers(🙏ˊᗜˋ*)

19_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 06｜The Irresistible Power of Base Code Has Activated!!
19_ustt_0.tl: Count Mokaka: ...//////My apologies... Mokaka: It's okay... mew mew(´•ω•)ﾉ^._.'... there there... Xin really wants to know how everyone feels about today's serving of fluff~ Please, please—leave your comments below, dear readers(🙏ˊᗜˋ*)

21_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信07｜是夢中也不會存在的烏托邦……
21_hkig_0.tl: 我貪戀此間所有，卻仍盼歸故土。肩頭未盡的責任，是我必須回歸的緣由。這一話裡埋了一些東西……其實……咱們這是正劇群像來的|･ω･｀)

21_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 07｜A Utopia That Doesn't Even Exist in Dreams...
21_usig_0.tl: I cling to every bit of this place, yet I still long to return home. The unfinished responsibilities on my shoulders—that's why I must go back. There are some hints buried in this chapter... Actually... this IS a serious ensemble drama |･ω･｀)

21_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 07｜A Utopia That Doesn't Even Exist in Dreams...
21_ustt_0.tl: I cling to every bit of this place, yet I still long to return home. The unfinished responsibilities on my shoulders—that's why I must go back. There are some hints buried in this chapter... Actually... this IS a serious ensemble drama |･ω･｀)

26_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信08｜咖啡好苦，貓貓卡請求全糖！
26_hkig_0.tl: 悠悠卡：明明…都是莫卡卡…怎麼能不喜歡咖啡……貓貓卡：咖啡也不是不行啦…請給我兩倍……不，四倍糖。～小信想要大家的評論按讚和收藏～拜託拜託！(◦˙▽˙◦)

26_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 08｜Coffee's Too Bitter, Kitty Cat Requests Full Sugar!
26_usig_0.tl: Youyouka: But... we're BOTH Mokaka... how can you not like coffee... Kitty Mokaka: Coffee's fine I guess... but please make it double... no, quadruple sugar. ~Xin wants your comments, likes, and saves~ Please please!(◦˙▽˙◦)

26_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 08｜Coffee's Too Bitter, Kitty Cat Requests Full Sugar!
26_ustt_0.tl: Youyouka: But... we're BOTH Mokaka... how can you not like coffee... Kitty Mokaka: Coffee's fine I guess... but please make it double... no, quadruple sugar. ~Xin wants your comments, likes, and saves~ Please please!(◦˙▽˙◦)

28_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信09｜末花：貼心暖咖有宇宙人速來！
28_hkig_0.tl: 末花平行宇宙的人就簡稱宇宙人吧～悠悠江：好的我已經猜到了，平行世界裡也有我！悠悠江：好想知道平行世界的我是什麼樣的啊……是不是也有貓耳朵和尾巴！天吶～我喜歡這個！(*/∇＼*)

28_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 09｜Suika: Warm Coffee & an Alien Friend, Apply Within!
28_usig_0.tl: Let's call parallel universe Suika "Space Suika"~ Youyou Jiang: I called it—there's a parallel world version of me too! Youyou Jiang: I wonder what parallel me is like... does she have cat ears and a tail too?! Omg—I love that!(*/∇＼*)

28_ustt_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 09｜Suika: Warm Coffee & an Alien Friend, Apply Within!
28_ustt_0.tl: Let's call parallel universe Suika "Space Suika"~ Youyou Jiang: I called it—there's a parallel world version of me too! Youyou Jiang: I wonder what parallel me is like... does she have cat ears and a tail too?! Omg—I love that!(*/∇＼*)

02_hkig_0.t: 隙間來信10｜不管做什麼都一定很厲害哼哼～
02_hkig_0.tl: 江江得意地晃動著腿腿，哼哼哼✧(≖◡≖✿) 莫卡卡和末花扒拉小框也特別萌！所以！給大家準備了表情包素材(≧∇≦)/就在評論區哦～

02_usig_0.t: Interdimensional Letter 10｜Bet You're Amazing at Everything, Hmph~
02_usig_0.tl: Jiang Jiang swings her legs triumphantly, hehehe✧(≖◡≖✿) Mokaka and Suika peeking through the little window is just too adorable! So! Sticker templates are ready for you(≧∇≦)/ Check the comments!
